summary: 2026-06-07 20:19:10 PDT (-0700): Re-reviewed only `git diff 7e04c37...HEAD` and `git log --oneline 7e04c37..HEAD` against `reviews/overlay-logging-quiet.md`. The tightened guard is wired after normalization and before subscriber delivery, accepts real `status`-bearing snapshots, and rejects the required anomaly shapes: null/undefined, strings, arrays, and objects without `status`. The receive-path tests cover the normal JSON-string/object cases plus string, array, and keyless-object anomalies. Focused Vitest could not run in this read-only sandbox because Vite attempted to write `client/node_modules/.vite-temp`.
